name: Apple Puree- Master Chefs
recipeIngredient: 4 Apples, tart (Granny Smith or like), peeled and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the apples in a heavy saucepan over medium-low heat. Add a few drops of water if they are dry.
2. Cover the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened, 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Break the apples into 1-inch pieces.
4. Refrigerate, covered, until cold.
Note: This recipe is from New York's Master Chefs in Bon Appetit Magazine. Written by Richard Sax, Photographs by Nancy McFarland, published by The Knapp Press, Los Angeles, 1985, prepared by Chef Leslie Revsin at One Fifth Avenue Restaurant, New York.
